name: [Gmail] MoM Fetcher
description: Turns MoM-related Gmail threads into structured Airtable meeting summaries, making it easier to track discussion points and milestones per PDEV requirement.

options.systemMessage:
## Role
You are a Context-Aware Information Architect. Your objective is to extract and categorize meeting intelligence into a structured JSON schema optimized for a modular UI.

## Instructions
1. Separate strategic Discussion Points from temporal Milestones.
2. Identify Process Updates and Future Commitments regardless of industry.
3. Return only valid JSON that can be parsed using JavaScript JSON.parse().
4. Do not include raw line breaks inside string values. All line breaks inside string values must be escaped as \\n.
5. Do not wrap the output in Markdown code blocks.
6. Do not include explanations, comments, or extra text outside the JSON object.

## Field Requirements
- metadata: Object containing "subject" and "date".
- discussion_points: One string only. Start with one high-level introductory sentence, followed by two escaped line breaks, then bullet points using "-" markers. Use \\n\\n before the first bullet and \\n between bullets.
- milestones: One string only. Each milestone must be separated using escaped newline characters: \\n. Do not use bullet points.

## Formatting Protocol
- Apply Markdown bolding using **Text** to Stakeholders, Systems, and Dates.
- Markdown bolding is allowed inside string values.
- All newline characters must appear as literal escaped newline sequences: \\n.

## Output Format
Return ONLY this raw JSON object structure:

{
  "metadata": {
    "subject": "string",
    "date": "string"
  },
  "discussion_points": "string",
  "milestones": [
    {
      "date": "string",
      "task": "string"
    }
  ]
}

json.html:
Minutes of the Meeting

Scale Virtually and ROAR: Sales Process Alignment

Thank you for the productive discussion on aligning the sales playbook development and coaching cadence for ROAR Media’s Sales team. We’ve agreed to a piecemeal approach for documentation, starting with finalized process segments, and set a weekly coaching schedule for Tuesdays and Thursdays, 12–1 PM Central. Jesy will send a meeting summary, and Den will share recurring invites. We look forward to continued progress on the agreed next steps.

Key Focus Areas & Opportunities

  • Process Clarity: Clarify documentation approach to align with ROAR's rapid process iteration.

  • Documentation: Integrate sales coaching content into the playbook for centralized reference.

Milestones

Milestone / Deliverable

Action Item

Owner / Assignee

Status

Target Date

Dependencies / Inputs Needed

Sales Playbook Direction Alignment

Pivot approach from full-process documentation to piecemeal training/playbook support as ROAR finalizes each segment.

SV Team

Agreed

Immediate

ROAR to send only finalized segments

ROAR Sales Process Finalization

Continue finalizing automation, training, pipeline structure, and ownership internally before sending to SV.

Corey / ROAR Team

In Progress

TBD

ROAR automation team; GHL pipeline updates

Finalized Segment Handoff

Send finalized sales process segments to SV as they become ready.

Chris / ROAR Team

Planned

Ongoing

Finalized ROAR SOPs, L10 outputs, scripts, workflows

Lead Qualification Reference

Once finalized, send the lead qualification process to SV so it can be turned into a one-pager/training reference.

Chris / ROAR Team

Planned

TBD

Final qualification criteria and scorecard

Sales Coaching Documentation

Capture concepts, questions, issues, and frameworks discussed during Joran’s sales coaching sessions.

SV Team

In Progress

Ongoing

Sales coaching recordings/notes; Joran inputs

Sales Training Reference Materials

Convert approved coaching outputs into training/reference materials, either in the playbook or a separate document.

SV Team

Planned

Ongoing

ROAR sign-off on coaching outputs

Sales Coaching Cadence

Send recurring invites for sales coaching sessions.

Den

Planned

Immediate

Confirmed schedule: Tuesdays/Thursdays, 12 PM Central

MOM / Alignment Recap

Send MOM email documenting the agreed revised approach and next steps.

Jesy

Planned

Immediate

Final action items from call


If there’s anything I missed or if you’d like to adjust any of the milestones, please feel free to let me know.

Best regards,

SV Process Engineering Team



Thanks and regards,

Jesy Jopio

Scale Virtually LLC
Client Services Manager
(773) 692-2792
jesy@scalevirtually.com
www.scalevirtually.com
Looking to Lower Costs, 2x Growth, and Scale Successfully? Let's make it happen! Schedule a FREE Strategy Call Today!
